seoTitle: Harkaway vs Harrietville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Harkaway and Harrietville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Harkaway and Harrietville.
heading: Harkaway vs Harrietville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Harkaway, Victoria and Harrietville, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Harrietville has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Harkaway (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Harkaway or Harrietville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Harkaway has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Harrietville scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Harkaway scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Harrietville scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Harkaway or Harrietville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Harrietville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
